title: IndiGo Cargo is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: IndiGo Cargo is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the IndiGo Cargo family as a Warehouse Manager in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IndiGo Cargo:
IndiGo Cargo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiGo Cargo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
